title: Bubble Gum, Lemonade &... Something For Mama
notes: Label variation:  Overall black label with the "Dunhill" and "ABC Records" logos in two separate colored boxes at the top. There is a registration symbol (®) just to the right of the 'ABC Records' logo.. The print around the perimeter of the label bottom is white and reads: "Dunhill Records, Inc. is a subsidiary and trademark licensee of ABC Records, Inc. New York, N.Y. 10019 • Made in USA".

videos.title: CASS ELLIOT Tribute - WHEN I JUST WEAR MY SMILE
videos.description: Lots of smiling photos in this tribute to the late great Cass Elliot.  "When I Just Wear My Smile" is taken from the LP "Dream a Little Dream of Me" by Mama Cass.  The song was written by T. Lane and S. Pulley.  Cass did a lovely job on this great tune.

videos.title: 1st RECORDING OF: Easy Come, Easy Go - Mama Cass Elliot (1969)
videos.description:
A top-10 hit in early 1970 for Bobby Sherman https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-VROhNqLI7M , this tune first appeared several months earlier in the Mama Cass LP “Bubble Gum, Lemonade & Something For Mama.”

Track originally issued on Dunhill LP 50055 -
